visualizerParams.title: Recursive Catalan with Memoization
visualizerParams.problemDescription: The provided code uses an iterative approach. Refactor it to use a recursive approach with memoization based on the recurrence relation `C(n+1) = Σ C(i) * C(n-i)` for `i` from 0 to `n`.

solution.explanation: The recursive version uses the fundamental definition of Catalan numbers. By using a `memo` dictionary, we avoid the exponential time complexity of pure recursion and achieve a efficient O(n^2) solution that clearly shows the underlying combinatorial structure.
